_doc: Allow-list for check-no-nodeenv-conditioned-auth.mjs. Each entry is a pre-existing, audited legitimate use of process.env.NODE_ENV in a restricted path. The guard fails on any unlisted hit. Adding a new entry requires reviewer scrutiny: NODE_ENV-conditioned authz/identity/daemon-call branches are forbidden; only non-authz conditioning (e.g. cookie-secure flag, dev-only logging) is acceptable. Spec: eliminate-permissive-authz Requirement 5.

permitted.rationale: Sets the active-tenant cookie's `secure` attribute to true only in production. NOT an authz bypass; localhost dev legitimately runs without TLS. Audited 2026-05-07; line moved 159->336 by the requireActiveTenant canonicalization (#592).
